# USAM Fund

> USAM Fund is a direct private and hard-money lender for real estate investors, operators, and developers, headquartered in Bee Cave, Texas and lending nationwide. We fund with our own capital and make our own credit decisions, so deals close fast. Tagline: "Hard money. Soft terms." Loans are for business purposes only; this is not a commitment to lend.

## Key facts

- Lender type: direct private / hard-money lender (not a broker); funds with in-house capital
- Coverage: nationwide (available in all 50 states); headquartered in Bee Cave, Texas
- Track record (advertised): $1B+ funded, 25K+ loans closed
- Speed: same-day term sheets; typical close in 5-7 days; can fund within 48 hours of clear title
- Published starting rates: DSCR rental from 5.50%, Fix and Flip / hard money from 7.99% (see each program page for current terms)
- Phone: 512-488-6087
- Application: https://usam.net/apply (multi-step, no hard credit pull to start)

## Loan programs

- [Fix and Flip](https://usam.net/programs/fix-flip): acquisition and rehab in one fast-closing loan
- [Rental / DSCR](https://usam.net/programs/rental-dscr): long-term financing that qualifies on the property's cash flow, not personal income
- [Ground-Up Construction](https://usam.net/programs/construction): capital to build from the dirt up, with a draw schedule
- [CRE Bridge](https://usam.net/programs/cre-bridge): flexible commercial bridge and cash-out
- [Transactional Financing](https://usam.net/programs/transactional): same-day capital for wholesaler double closings
- [Bank Statement / No-Doc](https://usam.net/programs/bank-statement): financing that skips income paperwork
- [Conventional Investment](https://usam.net/programs/conventional-investment): conventional financing for investment property
- [Portfolio Loans](https://usam.net/programs/portfolio): one loan across a whole rental portfolio
- [CRE Permanent](https://usam.net/programs/cre-permanent): long-term permanent commercial financing
- [SBA Financing](https://usam.net/programs/sba): 7(a) and 504 for owner-occupied real estate

## Free investor tools (calculators)

- [DSCR calculator](https://usam.net/calculators/dscr)
- [Fix and Flip profit calculator](https://usam.net/calculators/fix-and-flip)
- [BRRRR calculator](https://usam.net/calculators/brrrr)
- [Hard money cost calculator](https://usam.net/calculators/hard-money-cost)
- [Cap rate calculator](https://usam.net/calculators/cap-rate)
- [Cash-out refinance calculator](https://usam.net/calculators/cash-out-refinance)

- Full library: https://usam.net/resources
